name: Leo Park
bio: Community college transfer — juggling two jobs and a very sincere dream in audio engineering. Let's grab boba and compare playlists.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Robotics club lead who still burns ramen sometimes. I build silly gadgets to impress people I like — fair warning.

name: Devon Blake
bio: Line cook climbing toward sous-chef — my hands smell like garlic and ambition. Off Mondays; that's sacred.

name: Noah Reyes
bio: Firefighter + part-time carpenter. I will absolutely notice if your bookshelf is crooked. I'll fix it if you ask nicely.

name: Eli Hart
bio: High school coach and former D3 runner — I still carb-load emotionally. Looking for someone who likes slow Sunday miles.

name: Jordan Mills
bio: Music teacher — I can transpose your mood into a key signature. Kids think I'm cool; adults are harder to impress.

name: Sam Okonkwo
bio: Supply-chain analyst who grew up in three countries. I'll bore you with airport lounge opinions unless you stop me with a kiss.

name: Theo Nguyen
bio: Veterinarian — yes, I have dog hair on every jacket. I decompress with vinyl and very spicy pho.

name: Chris Vega
bio: Single dad to a seven-year-old comedian. My free nights are rare — if I offer one, I'm serious about showing up.

name: Alex Rivera
bio: Civil engineer — bridges, budgets, and a weakness for salsa dancing. I promise not to lecture you on load-bearing walls on date one.

name: Ben Carter
bio: Interning at a climate startup — I bike in the rain and call it character building. Coffee is non-negotiable.

name: Owen Patel
bio: Pharmacy student with a side gig tutoring orgo. I color-code my notes and my feelings — working on the second part.

name: Ryan Cho
bio: Freelance motion designer — I see easing curves in real life. Date idea: bad indie film, good commentary track by us.

name: Jake Morales
bio: Social worker — heavy days, soft heart. I recharge with pickup soccer and phone calls with my abuela.

name: Tyler Brooks
bio: Commercial pilot on reserve weeks — my schedule is chaos but my texts are on time. Let's meet between time zones.

name: Isaac Kim
bio: Actuary who plays stand-up open mics badly on purpose. I can price risk; I cannot price my taste in sneakers.

name: Dylan Foster
bio: Journalist covering city hall — cynical headline, hopeful heart. I know every 24-hour diner worth defending.

name: Nate Wilson
bio: Gap year ski bum saving for tuition — I work rentals and pretend I'm training for the Olympics. Après-ski is a lifestyle.

name: Ethan Cole
bio: Electrician running a small crew — I fix shorts in walls and in conversation. Weekend hobby: restoring a motorcycle I'll finish someday.

name: Miles Turner
bio: Nonprofit program director — I've read every grant narrative cliché and still believe in the work. Let's debrief over natural wine.
